brief: Maintainer cockpit highlights one priority cluster around onboarding friction, CI confusion, and repeated docs questions. Suggested response is a fast docs patch, one pinned issue for setup, and a clearer division between roadmap discussion and support traffic.
compositionNote: The cockpit starts as intake plus triage, but the real Bonfyre move is what comes after: the same artifacts can feed bonfyre-query, bonfyre-graph, bonfyre-queue, and bonfyre-sync without rebuilding the maintainer workflow from scratch.

moduleNotes.bonfyre-ingest: bonfyre-ingest pulls the maintainer input into a common artifact shape so the later stages can stay tiny.
moduleNotes.bonfyre-brief: bonfyre-brief gives the maintainer one compact synthesis before they open every issue thread.
moduleNotes.bonfyre-tag: bonfyre-tag layers operational labels on top of the same source artifact.
moduleNotes.bonfyre-embed: bonfyre-embed turns the issue cluster into a semantic memory surface for later retrieval.
moduleNotes.bonfyre-emit: bonfyre-emit packages the triage state into a digest or handoff artifact.

outputNotes.triage summary: bonfyre-brief gives maintainers one compact view of the current issue cluster so they can decide before they dive into every thread.
outputNotes.priority tags: bonfyre-tag adds a lightweight operational layer on top of the same intake artifact, which means priority can be inferred and revised without changing the source record.
outputNotes.semantic issue memory: bonfyre-embed turns maintainer inputs into a memory surface that can later be searched semantically instead of only by labels or exact strings.
outputNotes.maintainer digest: bonfyre-emit turns the triage state into a shareable digest for async review, handoff, or weekly maintainer rhythm.

compare.title: With And Without The New Layer
compare.note: The floor already gives maintainers a usable triage object. The orchestration layer only stays when it expands that same object into memory and handoff surfaces that earn their latency.

floor.title: Triage summary and priority state
floor.copy: This is the always-on maintainer path: ingest, brief, and tags. It gives you a compact decision surface without the extra memory and digest fanout.

metrics.You get: A triage summary and priority state
metrics.Good when: You just need to decide what matters next

layered.title: Same maintainer input, memory and handoff added
layered.copy: When the control layer sees enough reuse value, the same triage artifact branches into semantic memory and a maintainer digest. That makes the cockpit useful across sessions instead of only in the moment.

metrics.Why it matters: The same triage work stays useful later
